steps.title: Identify the core element of an overview
steps.content: An overview of the matsutake commodity chain must depict the actual chain—how it connects production to consumption. The notes provide two concrete endpoints: pickers in Oregon and wealthy consumers in Japan.

steps.title: Locate the choice that depicts the chain
steps.content:
C depicts the matsutake commodity chain directly by showing how it “links matsutake pickers in Oregon with wealthy consumers of the costly mushrooms in Japan”—both endpoints and their connection.

The other three either focus on historical origins (A), define commodity chains generically (B), or describe only one endpoint (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
